tagline: Your Trusted Family & Veteran Owned Pool Service in Greater St. Louis

hero.headline:
Family-Owned Pool Care You Can
Always Trust
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your backyard escape, not a weekend chore. Paradise Pools STL is a veteran and family owned team serving Greater St. Louis since 2008. We handle every detail so you can just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block"> Greater St. Louis Families
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to full repairs, our certified and background-checked technicians handle everything your pool needs. Every visit includes a detailed photo report.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Recurring maintenance starting at $70/visit. We skim debris, empty baskets, test and balance chemicals, and email you a photo service report after every single visit.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Comprehensive seasonal services starting at $400. We remove winter covers, install hardware, start filtration, and winterize equipment so your pool is protected year-round.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Algae-filled pool? We restore neglected pools to crystal clear condition through deep cleaning and professional chemical treatment. Swim again in days, not weeks.

cards.title: Pumps & Filter Installation
cards.description: Energy efficient pool pump and filtration system sales and installation. Upgrade your equipment to improve water quality and cut your monthly operating costs.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repairs
cards.description: Professional leak detection and full repair services. We find the source of water loss and fix it before small problems turn into expensive headaches.

cards.title: Hot Tub Services
cards.description: Maintenance, repair, and servicing for hot tubs and spas. We keep your spa clean, safe, and running at peak performance all year long.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Request Your Free Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We will provide an honest, no-pressure quote quickly. Veteran and family owned means straight talk, no gimmicks.

steps.title: Our Certified Team Gets to Work
steps.description: Background-checked, certified technicians arrive on schedule. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, photos, and a detailed report emailed to you after every visit.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool with Confidence
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season. With photo reports after every visit, you always know exactly what was done and how your pool looks.

about.label: Why St. Louis Trusts Us
about.headline: Veteran Owned, Family Operated, Community Committed
about.description: Founded in 2008 by Greg Maurath Jr., Paradise Pools STL has grown from a one-person operation to a team of 11 certified professionals. As a veteran and family owned business, we hold ourselves to the highest standards. Every technician is background checked and certified. Every visit includes a photo report. We treat your pool like it is our own.

features.title: Background-Checked & Certified
features.description: Every technician passes a thorough background check and holds current certifications before ever stepping foot in your backyard.

features.title: Photo Reports Every Visit
features.description: After every service, we email you a detailed report with photos so you know exactly what was done and how your pool looks. Complete transparency.

features.title: Military Discount Available
features.description: As a veteran owned company, we proudly offer a military discount to fellow service members and their families. Thank you for your service.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Honest quotes from a veteran owned business. We accept Google Pay, PayPal, credit, debit, check, and cash.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and make it right at no extra charge. We have maintained our BBB A+ rating since 2008 because we stand behind every job. Your satisfaction is not just a promise, it is how we have built our reputation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within a few days. For green pool emergencies, we respond as quickly as possible. Call us at 314-665-5500 and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Are your technicians background-checked?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every single technician on our team passes a comprehensive background check and holds current pool service certifications. Your family's safety and peace of mind come first.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the Greater St. Louis Area including Chesterfield, Ballwin, Manchester, Des Peres, Wildwood, Frontenac, Town and Country, Ladue, Kirkwood, Sunset Hills, and Fenton.

faqs.question: Do you send service reports?
faqs.answer: Yes. After every single visit, we email you a detailed service report with photos so you know exactly what was done and how your pool looks. Full transparency is standard with us.

faqs.question: Do you offer a military discount?
faqs.answer: Yes, we do. As a veteran owned business, we are proud to offer a military discount to active duty members, veterans, and their families. Just let us know when you request your quote.

testimonials.name: Sarah T.
testimonials.text: Paradise Pools has been taking care of our pool for years. Their technicians are professional, thorough, and always on time. The service reports with photos after every visit give us complete peace of mind.

testimonials.name: Michael R.
testimonials.text: As a fellow veteran, I appreciate how Greg and his team run this business. The pool opening service was flawless and they had everything running perfectly in no time. Honest, dependable people.

testimonials.name: Jennifer W.
testimonials.text: We called Paradise Pools based on their BBB A+ rating and were not disappointed. Timely, professional service and they took the time to explain our entire pool system to us. Highly recommend.

Ready for a Pool You

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from our veteran and family owned team. Honest pricing, certified technicians, and photo reports after every visit.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
